title: Scape and Run: Meshi
description: Food items out of Parasites & their Nodes for extended survival! Inspired by Dungeon Meshi
body:
_From a developer of Scape and Run: Parasites_

A small mod made for modpacks, SRP: Meshi allows you to turn excess Parasite loot and some Parasite Biome "plants" into (mostly) safe-to-eat foods! Ever wondered how survival past phase 5 could be possible, even with crop growth halted? Look no further!

This mod is lightweight and only needs Scape and Run: Parasites to be present.

An additional compatibility module with TerrafirmaCraft is included.

For old art seen before v1.6: [Developer Art Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/srpm-developer-art-pack)
